# Eleven Coats Painting

> Eleven Coats Painting is a Phoenix-based residential and commercial painting contractor serving the greater Phoenix metropolitan area, including Scottsdale, Paradise Valley, Tempe, Chandler, Gilbert, Mesa, Peoria, Glendale, Goodyear, Surprise, Sun City, Queen Creek, Sun Lakes, Cave Creek, and Fountain Hills. Licensed, bonded, and insured in Arizona (ROC #360099). Founded by Jim Bailey, with 25+ years of painting industry experience.

## Company facts

- **Legal name:** Eleven Coats Painting
- **Founder & CEO:** Jim Bailey
- **Headquarters:** Phoenix metropolitan area, Arizona
- **Service area:** Greater Phoenix, Arizona (Maricopa County)
- **Arizona license:** ROC #360099 (Residential and Commercial)
- **Website:** https://elevencoatspainting.com
- **Phone:** (480) 550-0099
- **Minimum project size:** $2,500
- **Focus:** Full-home interiors, full exteriors, full kitchen cabinet refinishing, HOA and multifamily exteriors, retail and commercial repaints

## What Eleven Coats does

- **Exterior painting** — stucco, wood trim, fascia, block walls, iron, garage doors, HOA and multifamily exteriors
- **Interior painting** — walls, ceilings, trim, doors, cabinets, full-home repaints
- **Cabinet refinishing** — kitchen and bathroom cabinets, professionally sprayed in a controlled environment
- **Commercial painting** — retail, office, multifamily, HOA, property management repaints

## Pricing (approximate 2026 ranges)

- **Exterior, small home (~1,500–2,000 sq ft):** $4,500–$7,500
- **Exterior, medium home (2,000–2,800 sq ft):** $7,000–$11,000
- **Exterior, large home (2,800+ sq ft):** $10,500–$18,000+
- **Interior, small scope:** $4,500–$6,500
- **Interior, medium scope:** $6,500–$9,500
- **Interior, large scope (full home, walls + trim + ceilings):** $9,500–$16,000
- **Cabinet refinishing, small kitchen:** $3,000–$5,500
- **Cabinet refinishing, medium kitchen:** $4,500–$8,500
- **Cabinet refinishing, large kitchen:** $6,500–$11,000

- [Homepage](https://elevencoatspainting.com/): Company overview and positioning

- [Cabinet refinishing](https://elevencoatspainting.com/cabinet-refinishing): Kitchen and bath cabinets

## Why it matters

Eleven Coats is built around a simple promise: most painters bid to win, Eleven Coats bids to last. Full prep, premium products (Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore), two-coat application standard, and a written warranty. The $2,500 minimum exists because the team is focused on projects where the quality process delivers a meaningful difference — full homes, full exteriors, full kitchens — not touch-ups or single rooms.
